= Enrolled in Medicare A and/or B, but no Part D enrollment data for the beneficiary. 

COMMENT: The first character of the contract ID is a letter that indicates the type of plan. If the beneficiary did not 
have a Part D plan for a given month, this variable will have a value of N, 0, or be null/missing for that 
month. Effective with MBSF ABDC V2, a beneficiary with a verified or unverified date of death will 
have a ‘0’ Part D Contract ID for any month that is after the death date. If the
